derivation_source: Exact clean commit-bound tested-site bundle from GitHub Actions build run 29177953198; deployed and attested by run 29178074691 without rebuilding.

19,050,769 bytes; 270 regular-file members; SHA-256 037563bc62792ecd968cf923b94e3082b02597f1b97f81b63fa59c6d083ee2db; public redownload verified byte-for-byte.
These formats and editions are explicitly outside the v2.2.0 release scope and are neither generated nor approved by this record.

review_status.notes: All internal content, structure, continuity, rendering, browser, proof, evidence, rights, tested-artifact, archive, public-redownload, and attestation gates passed. No external-human prepublication review was requested or claimed.

companion_material.review_notes: No companion edition is part of this release.

human_consumption_gate.notes: The canonical HTML surface passed internal continuity, live-view, accessibility, and desktop/mobile browser checks; unselected formats remain outside scope.

audiobook_gate.notes: Audio is outside the v2.2.0 release scope.

release_notes: The ASI Stack v2.2.0 completes the Post-v2.1 Residual and Transfer Roadmap. It records three bounded programs for governed usefulness and rollback, ambiguous routing and real-model deliberation, and full-state update/unlearning causality; fourteen chapter-core no-change decisions; six bounded non-core transitions; eleven residual dispositions; six modern external-source routes; and QCSA integration across nine existing chapters. No chapter-core support state is promoted. Tag-bound rights-routing snapshot SHA-256: aa28005dabd7578924e65e043f8bd5b3cba15ded160eda5876b433e7a48dd2c7.
residuals: All 54 chapter-core claims remain at argument support; this release creates no support-state promotion.
The residual ledger preserves narrowed, persisted, and closed lanes plus three infrastructure-conditional deferrals.
The live root and /latest/ channels are mutable; the GitHub Release archive is the immutable v2.2.0 rendered-site artifact.
EPUB, DOCX, PDF, audio, and curated-reader editions remain outside this release.
No external-human prepublication review, independent audit, DOI, or external peer review is claimed.
non_claims: does not prove ASI or AGI capability, production readiness, deployment safety, economic value, or universal governance correctness
does not promote any chapter-core claim above its recorded evidence state
does not generalize three bounded empirical programs to open-world or production behavior
does not claim QCSA implementation, benchmark performance, or empirical validation
does not claim released EPUB, DOCX, PDF, audio, or curated-reader artifacts
does not claim independent legal review, third-party ownership clearance, external audit, or external-human peer review
